name: invoke-agent-action
description: Spawn a child agent when a lifecycle event fires — e.g. a coder's Stop hook spawns a code-reviewer. Bounded by a recursion-depth cap, a concurrency cap, and the subagent approval gate; always fire-and-forget so the lifecycle never blocks. Attach to an agent to activate.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Task
x-meta.help: Prompt for the spawned agent. Supports $EVENT, $CONTEXT, and $<payload-key>.

x-meta.label: Agent
x-meta.help: Child agent name (e.g. code-reviewer). Empty uses the default agent.

x-meta.label: Max Turns
x-meta.help: Optional turn cap for the child agent.

x-meta.label: Model
x-meta.help: Optional model override for the child agent.

x-meta.label: Approval
x-meta.help: Set 'auto' to skip the spawn approval gate for this hook. Empty inherits the global auto_approve_subagent_spawn.
